/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libtest_interface__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libtest_interface__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/test_interface__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/test_interface/msg/detail/obj_position__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/test_interface__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/test_interface/msg/detail/resnet_msg__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/test_interface__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/test_interface/msg/detail/video_log_msg__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/test_interface__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/test_interface/msg/detail/object_msg__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl
